text: Updated src/agents/auth.py to fix the token refresh bug.
The handler in memorymaster/service.py::ingest now calls resolve_or_create.
Tests live under tests/test_entity_registry.py and tests/fixtures/dedup_cases.json.
Renamed scripts/backfill_entity_extraction.py after review.
The config lives at obsidian-vault/wiki/project-memorymaster/index.md now.
Moved schema definition from schema.sql to migrations/0003_entities.sql.
Edited .github/workflows/ci.yml to pin the Python version.
Check the frontend/src/components/Header.tsx render path for the bug.
GEMINI_API_KEY must be set before running the ingestion pipeline.
We read the workspace from MEMORYMASTER_WORKSPACE on startup.
Both QDRANT_URL and QDRANT_API_KEY are optional in dev.
When OPENAI_API_KEY is missing the llm_provider falls back to Ollama.
Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the .env file, never commit it.
The NODE_ENV=production switch turns on caching.
DATABASE_URL now points at the WAL-enabled replica.
Export MEMORYMASTER_DB_PATH before running the steward cycle.
Deployed to unms-server-01 last night and the migration ran clean.
whatsappbot-prod is still pinned at v3.1.2 pending review.
The aircontrol-ingest-service timed out against the upstream API.
We switched traffic from omniclaude-server to git-server-02.
qdrant-cloud-prod is reachable from the mcp-gateway-01 node.
Restart redis-cache-02 if you see connection exhaustion.
Added the puntofutura-backend host to the Caddy config.
The steward-worker-01 pod keeps OOMing during compaction.
The MCP server is now listening on :8765 by default.
Postgres runs on port 5432, Redis on port 6379.
We bind the dev server to :3000 and the docs site to :8000.
Qdrant listens on port 6333 for HTTP and :6334 for gRPC.
Changed the Vite dev port to :5173 to avoid collision.
Nginx fronts the app on :80 and :443 with TLS.
The wezbridge daemon exposes :11434 for local control.
Reverted commit b1a0ac9 because the test suite went red.
Fix was shipped in commit 71d7f67a9 and backported to main.
Commit 5cd8a48ef3a raised the sensitivity filter F1 to 0.995.
Merged at sha 6050b2d into the dedup branch.
See commit 6736bf8a for the recall query tokenization fix.
The regression was introduced at b3aa0ed and reverted next morning.
Cherry-picked commit deadbeef1234 onto the release branch.
Used playwright to reproduce the drag-drop regression locally.
Asked codex for a second opinion on the migration plan.
The mcp__memorymaster__query_memory tool returned 0 hits for the scope.
mcp__memorymaster__ingest_claim now passes through the sensitivity filter.
Ran gitnexus analyze to rebuild the index after the merge.
serena find_symbol pointed me at the right function fast.
graphify produced a new GRAPH_REPORT.md under graphify-out.
gemini refused the request, so we fell back to ollama.
Checked with droid before merging — it flagged two missing tests.
opencode couldn't reproduce the bug, so we switched to codex for triage.
The mcp__wezbridge__discover_sessions call listed 4 panes.
pytest ran 342 tests, all green on tests/test_service.py.
After setting GEMINI_API_KEY we restarted the unms-server-01 host on :8765.
Commit 9a4c2bf1 in memorymaster/service.py fixed the GEMINI_API_KEY fallback.
Tested playwright against mcp-gateway-01:8765 and got 200s.
Moved the entity registry out of memorymaster/storage.py into entity_registry.py.
The vault_linter.py pass complained about missing wikilinks.
Dropped config-templates/hook.json after the migration.
See memorymaster/wiki_engine.py::absorb for the compile-truth pass.
Fixed the regex in scripts/setup-hooks.py to handle Windows paths.
OLLAMA_BASE_URL is read by llm_provider.py on import.
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY must never be logged — sensitivity filter catches it.
QDRANT_GRPC_PORT defaults to 6334 if unset.
Provisioned a new aircontrol-db-replica-02 for failover.
whatsappbot-staging now mirrors prod with a 5-minute lag.
moved traffic away from legacy-unifi-01 to unifi-cloud-02.
Scheduled maintenance on memorymaster-worker-03 tonight at 02:00 ART.
Grafana dashboard lives on :3001 behind the nginx proxy.
Prometheus scrapes on port 9090, alertmanager on port 9093.
Bumped the MCP stdio bridge to :7823 after the conflict.
Traefik is now bound to :8443 with LetsEncrypt.
Regression lives in commit a1b2c3d4e5f6 — revert when confirmed.
The fix was in 0f1e2d3 — trivial one-liner.
Rebased onto commit cafebabedead on the main branch.
Hotfix 12ab34cd5 unblocked the deploy pipeline.
Previous behaviour was set in commit abcd1234ef on 2026-03-15.
claude-code resolved the conflict without touching tests.
Used ollama + gemini together for the dual-LLM review.
mcp__gitnexus__impact flagged the d=1 blast radius before I edited.
ripgrep is faster than grep — use rg in scripts by default.
pyright flagged two type errors after the dataclass change.
Ran ruff --fix on memorymaster/ and committed the results.
mypy reports 0 errors after the migration to TypedDict.
docker compose up brings mcp-gateway-01 and qdrant-cloud-prod online.
The LOG_LEVEL env var now respects DEBUG over INFO in dev.
PYTHONPATH includes memorymaster/ by default when you pip install -e .
CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is injected by the harness for every hook call.
We moved the config from src/config/default.yaml to configs/prod.yaml.
The handler is declared in memorymaster/mcp_server.py near the top.
Added a test in tests/test_mcp_server.py that exercises the ingest path.
obsidian-vault/wiki/project-memorymaster/mcp-server.md is the canonical doc.
The unifi-core-dc1 host runs on :8443 with a self-signed cert.
qdrant-ingest-worker-01 died at 04:13 UTC last night.
mcp-openclaw-gateway-02 is the new synchronization target.
Need HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN to pull the private embedding model.
REDIS_URL should use rediss:// in production, not redis://.
Running npx gitnexus analyze re-indexes the repo in about 20s.
The nightly cron runs /cron/memorymaster-steward.sh at 02:00.
Fixed a typo in the CI config at .github/actions/setup-python.yml.
See commit f00dbabe in memorymaster/dream_bridge.py for the queue fix.
git rebase -i HEAD~5 to squash the noisy commits before review.
npm ci is the canonical install path for the CI runner.
Deployed aircontrol-backend-prod to :8000 after the migration.
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN rotates weekly via the secrets manager.
Set MEMORYMASTER_ENTITY_LLM=1 to enable the Layer-2 LLM extraction pass.
We cached the output in /tmp/memorymaster/entities.json for reuse.
Compared mcp__serena__find_symbol vs grep for impact analysis speed.
Exposed the debugger on :9229 for remote Node attach.
cafef00d is the rollback target if the deploy goes sideways.
